overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a video game showing a character walking along urban sidewalks at night. The character crosses a busy street at a crosswalk and continues past a university building with historic stone architecture.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated urban sidewalk alongside multi-lane road

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the sidewalk passing pedestrians walking in the opposite direction

notable_agents.action: woman in red dress walking toward the camera along the sidewalk
white sedan driving along the road parallel to the sidewalk

entered.detail: low-rise brown brick commercial building with flat roof and large windows
concrete retaining wall separating the elevated sidewalk from the lower building level
white vintage sedan parked along the curb
tall metal street lamp illuminating the sidewalk
city lights and buildings visible in the background against the night sky

segments.scene_description: The character walks along an elevated urban sidewalk at night, passing a low brick building on the left and a parked white sedan on the right. Street lamps cast artificial light on the stone pavement as pedestrians walk in the opposite direction and traffic moves along the adjacent multi-lane road.

scene_state.functional_zone: busy intersection crosswalk with stopped traffic

events.description: character steps off the sidewalk onto the marked crosswalk to cross the multi-lane street
vehicles stop at the crosswalk to allow pedestrians to cross the intersection

agents.ego_description: crossing the street at the zebra crosswalk between stopped vehicles

notable_agents.action: man in suspenders and hat crossing the street from right to left
white pickup truck stopped at the crosswalk waiting for pedestrians

entered.detail: white striped pedestrian crossing painted on the asphalt road
red telephone booth on the street corner
tall stone wall with 'UNIVERSITY' carved into it marking the campus boundary
gray vintage convertible with top down stopped at the crosswalk

segments.scene_description: The character enters a wide intersection crosswalk, navigating between vehicles that have stopped to allow pedestrians to pass. A telephone booth stands on the corner while the stone wall of a university becomes visible across the street. The scene is illuminated by streetlights and car headlights as multiple pedestrians cross simultaneously.

events.description: character reaches the opposite sidewalk and turns left to walk along the university wall

agents.ego_description: walking along the stone wall of the university campus, passing under trees

entered.detail: large historic stone university building with columns and lit windows behind the wall
black iron fence on top of the stone wall surrounding the campus
mature trees with dense foliage lining the campus perimeter

segments.scene_description: After crossing the street, the character walks along the perimeter of a university campus, passing by a tall stone wall with iron fencing. The historic university building is visible behind the wall with illuminated windows, while trees cast shadows on the sidewalk. Traffic is lighter on this side of the street as the character continues along the path.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a bustling urban street at night that transitions into the quieter perimeter of a historic university campus. It begins on an elevated sidewalk, passing a low brick building and a parked white sedan under the artificial glow of street lamps. As the character reaches a wide intersection, the scene shifts into a busy crosswalk where the camera navigates between stopped vehicles and passing pedestrians beneath the glare of car headlights. The perspective then opens up across the street, moving past a corner telephone booth toward a tall stone wall topped with iron fencing. Finally, the environment becomes more serene as the camera follows the path along the university campus, passing illuminated windows of a historic building and trees casting deep shadows on the sidewalk.
